name: Acid Splash
rules_text: Dex save or acid damage to one or two targets.
description: You hurl acid at creatures within range.

name: Blade Ward
rules_text: Gain resistance to weapon damage until your next turn.
description: A brief ward hardens you against weapon strikes.

name: Chill Touch
rules_text: Ranged necrotic attack; target cannot regain hit points.
description: A skeletal hand clings to the target with necrotic power.

name: Dancing Lights
rules_text: Create and move up to four small lights.
description: You conjure drifting lights for utility and distraction.

name: Eldritch Blast
rules_text: Make a ranged spell attack that deals force damage.
description: A crackling beam slams into a target.

name: Fire Bolt
rules_text: Ranged fire attack; ignites unattended flammables.
description: A mote of flame streaks to a target.

name: Guidance
rules_text: Target adds 1d4 to one ability check.
description: Brief divine insight aids a chosen task.

name: Light
rules_text: Object sheds bright and dim light.
description: You imbue an object with steady magical light.

name: Mage Hand
rules_text: Create spectral hand to manipulate objects up to 10 pounds.
description: An invisible-like hand performs simple interactions.

name: Mending
rules_text: Repair one break or tear in an object.
description: Small material damage knits back together.

name: Minor Illusion
rules_text: Create a sound or image illusion in a small area.
description: A compact illusion fools sight or hearing.

name: Poison Spray
rules_text: Con save or poison damage.
description: You project a burst of toxic vapor.

name: Prestidigitation
rules_text: Perform small magical tricks and sensory effects.
description: A toolkit of minor arcane flourishes.

name: Produce Flame
rules_text: Create light in hand; can be hurled for fire damage.
description: A flame appears in your palm until discharged.

name: Ray of Frost
rules_text: Ranged cold attack; target speed is reduced.
description: A frigid ray slows enemies.

name: Resistance
rules_text: Target adds 1d4 to one saving throw.
description: Protective magic steadies a creature's resolve.

name: Sacred Flame
rules_text: Dex save or radiant damage; target gets no cover benefit.
description: Divine fire descends on your foe.

name: Shillelagh
rules_text: Imbue club/quarterstaff to use spellcasting ability for attacks.
description: A wooden weapon becomes magically potent.

name: Shocking Grasp
rules_text: Melee spell attack; target cannot take reactions.
description: Electric force jolts and disrupts your foe.

name: Thaumaturgy
rules_text: Create small divine sensory manifestations.
description: Minor miracles amplify your presence.

name: True Strike
rules_text: Gain brief insight to aid your next attack.
description: You momentarily read a target's defenses.

name: Vicious Mockery
rules_text: Wis save or psychic damage and attack disadvantage.
description: A cutting insult rattles your enemy.

name: Bless
rules_text: Up to three allies add 1d4 to attacks and saves.
description: Holy favor bolsters allies in battle.

name: Burning Hands
rules_text: Dex save for half from a cone of fire.
description: You unleash a short, intense burst of flame.

name: Charm Person
rules_text: Humanoid Wis save or charmed until spell ends.
description: You make one humanoid regard you as a friendly acquaintance.

name: Cure Wounds
rules_text: Restore hit points to a creature you touch.
description: You channel healing energy through contact.

name: Detect Magic
rules_text: Sense magic within 30 feet and identify school with action.
description: You perceive magical auras around creatures and objects.

name: Faerie Fire
rules_text: Dex save or outlined; attackers gain advantage.
description: Glittering light reveals hidden foes and aids strikes.

name: Guiding Bolt
rules_text: Ranged radiant attack; next attack has advantage.
description: A lance of holy light marks the target.

name: Healing Word
rules_text: Restore a small amount of hit points at range.
description: A quick word of power mends wounds.

name: Hex
rules_text: Curse target: extra damage and ability-check penalty.
description: You bind a foe with a baleful curse.

name: Hunter's Mark
rules_text: Mark target for extra weapon damage and tracking benefits.
description: You focus predatory magic on chosen prey.

name: Mage Armor
rules_text: Target AC becomes 13 + Dex modifier.
description: A protective force surrounds an unarmored creature.

name: Magic Missile
rules_text: Three darts auto-hit and deal force damage.
description: Unerring bolts strike creatures you can see.

name: Shield
rules_text: Gain +5 AC vs trigger and block magic missile.
description: A sudden arcane barrier deflects incoming harm.

name: Sleep
rules_text: Roll hit-point pool; lowest-current-HP creatures fall unconscious.
description: A lull of magic puts foes to sleep.

name: Aid
rules_text: Increase current and maximum HP of up to three creatures.
description: Bolstering magic toughens allies for hours.

name: Darkness
rules_text: Create magical darkness that nonmagical light cannot illuminate.
description: A sphere of deep shadow obscures vision.

name: Hold Person
rules_text: Humanoid Wis save or paralyzed; repeats save each turn.
description: You lock a humanoid in place with enchantment.

name: Invisibility
rules_text: Creature becomes invisible until attacking/casting or spell ends.
description: You veil a target from sight.

name: Lesser Restoration
rules_text: End one disease or blinded/deafened/paralyzed/poisoned condition.
description: Curative magic removes common debilitating effects.

name: Misty Step
rules_text: Teleport up to 30 feet to visible space.
description: You briefly become mist and reappear nearby.

name: Scorching Ray
rules_text: Make three ranged fire spell attacks.
description: You fire multiple rays of searing heat.

name: Spiritual Weapon
rules_text: Create floating weapon that attacks as bonus action.
description: A spectral weapon strikes under your command.

name: Counterspell
rules_text: Interrupt casting creature; auto-stop low-level spells.
description: You unravel enemy magic mid-cast.

name: Dispel Magic
rules_text: End spell effects on creature, object, or magical effect.
description: You cancel active magical effects.

name: Fireball
rules_text: Dex save for half in 20-foot-radius explosion.
description: A blazing detonation engulfs a wide area.

name: Fly
rules_text: Grant flying speed 60 feet to a willing creature.
description: You lift a creature into sustained magical flight.

name: Haste
rules_text: Boost speed, AC, Dex saves, and grant extra action limits.
description: Time-bending magic accelerates an ally.

name: Lightning Bolt
rules_text: Dex save for half from a long lightning line.
description: A crackling line of lightning tears through foes.

name: Revivify
rules_text: Return recently dead creature to life with 1 HP.
description: You call a soul back moments after death.

name: Spirit Guardians
rules_text: Nearby enemies take radiant/necrotic damage and slow.
description: Protective spirits swarm around you.

name: Banishment
rules_text: Cha save or target is sent to harmless demiplane or home plane.
description: You remove a creature from the battlefield.

name: Dimension Door
rules_text: Teleport yourself and one willing creature.
description: You step through space to a known destination.

name: Freedom of Movement
rules_text: Target ignores difficult movement restraints and paralysis effects.
description: Magic frees movement from mundane impediments.

name: Greater Invisibility
rules_text: Target stays invisible even while attacking/casting.
description: An advanced invisibility veil does not break on offense.

name: Ice Storm
rules_text: Bludgeoning and cold damage in 20-foot-radius cylinder.
description: Hail and freezing rain batter an area.

name: Polymorph
rules_text: Transform creature into beast form with beast stat block.
description: You reshape flesh into a new animal body.

name: Stoneskin
rules_text: Target gains resistance to nonmagical physical damage.
description: Skin hardens into rock-like durability.

name: Wall of Fire
rules_text: Create fiery wall dealing damage when it appears/when crossed.
description: You raise a blazing barrier across the field.

name: Cone of Cold
rules_text: Con save for half from massive cold burst.
description: A wave of deadly frost spreads from you.

name: Flame Strike
rules_text: Dex save for half from fire and radiant column.
description: Divine flame crashes down in a cylinder.

name: Greater Restoration
rules_text: End severe effects like petrification, curse, ability drain, exhaustion.
description: Powerful restorative magic removes deep afflictions.

name: Hold Monster
rules_text: Wis save or creature is paralyzed; repeats save each turn.
description: You freeze nearly any creature in place.

name: Mass Cure Wounds
rules_text: Heal up to six creatures in a large radius.
description: A broad wave of healing reaches multiple allies.

name: Raise Dead
rules_text: Return dead creature to life with penalties and limits.
description: You restore life to the dead with substantial ritual power.

name: Scrying
rules_text: Observe distant creature/location via magical sensor.
description: You spy remotely through divinatory vision.

name: Wall of Force
rules_text: Create invisible, nearly indestructible barrier.
description: A pure force wall blocks movement and effects.

name: Blade Barrier
rules_text: Create wall of whirling blades that damages creatures.
description: A storm of spinning steel forms a lethal barrier.

name: Chain Lightning
rules_text: Primary target and arcs to others take lightning damage.
description: A powerful bolt jumps across multiple enemies.

name: Disintegrate
rules_text: Dex save or take huge force damage; reduced to dust at 0 HP.
description: A green ray can erase a creature or object.

name: Heal
rules_text: Restore a large HP amount and cure blindness/deafness/disease.
description: Potent healing magic instantly revitalizes a creature.

name: Heroes' Feast
rules_text: Feast grants HP increase, fear/poison immunity, and Wis save advantage.
description: A ceremonial meal empowers allies for 24 hours.

name: Mass Suggestion
rules_text: Influence up to twelve creatures with a reasonable command.
description: A broad enchantment directs many minds at once.

name: Sunbeam
rules_text: Radiant line each round; can blind targets.
description: You project sustained brilliant solar energy.

name: True Seeing
rules_text: Target perceives invisibility, illusions, transformations, and ethereal forms.
description: Enhanced sight reveals hidden magical truth.

name: Fire Storm
rules_text: Shape contiguous cubes of fire; Dex save for half.
description: You call down a massive storm of divine flame.

name: Plane Shift
rules_text: Transport creatures to another plane or banish by melee spell attack.
description: You force planar travel through powerful magic.

name: Regenerate
rules_text: Target regains HP over time and regrows severed body parts.
description: Vital magic restores even catastrophic injuries.

name: Resurrection
rules_text: Return dead creature to life even after long death.
description: A high ritual recalls the dead to life.

name: Reverse Gravity
rules_text: Invert gravity in a large cylinder.
description: The battlefield turns upside down.

name: Symbol
rules_text: Inscribe magical glyph with powerful triggered effects.
description: A hidden rune unleashes severe magical punishment.

name: Teleport
rules_text: Instant long-range travel for party and objects.
description: You and allies blink across the world.

name: Dominate Monster
rules_text: Control actions of a creature that fails Wis save.
description: You seize command of a creature's will.

name: Earthquake
rules_text: Shake wide area causing difficult terrain, collapses, and damage.
description: The ground ruptures with devastating force.

name: Feeblemind
rules_text: Int save or severe mental debilitation until cured.
description: A psychic blast crushes intellect and personality.

name: Glibness
rules_text: Minimum Charisma check result becomes 15; magic can't detect lies easily.
description: Words flow with supernatural persuasiveness.

name: Holy Aura
rules_text: Allies in aura gain defensive bonuses; fiends/undead are hindered.
description: Radiant aura protects companions and punishes evil.

name: Power Word Stun
rules_text: Stun creature with 150 HP or fewer with no save initially.
description: A commanding word leaves the target reeling.

name: Sunburst
rules_text: Huge radiant burst; Con save for half and potential blindness.
description: An explosion of sunlight scorches and blinds.

name: Foresight
rules_text: Target gains advantage on attacks/checks/saves; attackers have disadvantage.
description: You grant profound future-sense and near-perfect awareness.

name: Gate
rules_text: Open portal between planes or call a named creature.
description: A rift links worlds at your command.

name: Mass Heal
rules_text: Distribute massive healing among creatures in range.
description: A wave of supreme restorative energy sweeps allies.

name: Meteor Swarm
rules_text: Four massive explosions deal fire and bludgeoning damage.
description: Cataclysmic meteors devastate a huge area.

name: Power Word Kill
rules_text: Instantly kill creature with 100 HP or fewer.
description: A single utterance snuffs out life.

name: True Resurrection
rules_text: Restore life even after long death; can recreate body.
description: The mightiest life-restoring magic known.

name: Wish
rules_text: Replicate lower-level spells or attempt broader reality-altering effects.
description: You bend reality to your will at great risk.
